title: Why Ross Stores Stock Was Up 10% This Week
text: The retailer benefited from a bounce in optimism on Wall Street.

title: Ross Stores Stock the "Best Way" to Play Retail Sector
text: Shares of Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) are up 4.4% to trade at $91.00 this morning, after Wells Fargo upgraded the discount retailer to "overweight" from "equal weight.

title: Ross Stores Stock's Bearish Signal Has Never Been Wrong
text: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) is moving higher today, last seen up 3.5% to trade at $88.98 and pacing for its fifth daily win in six.
